contract.name: Auto Agent Protocol A2A Automotive Retail Profile

rules: Always call inventory.search or inventory.vehicle before lead.submit so that the VIN, stock, or vehicle_id you put in vehicle_of_interest is one Demo Toyota actually has in stock or in transit.

Never invoke lead.submit without an explicit, verbatim ConsentGrant captured from the user; the consent's allowed_channels MUST be a subset of the channels the user agreed to, and consent.scope MUST be ['lead_submission'].
When quoting price to the user, prefer the FTC-final 'price' field; if you show 'list_price' or 'msrp', clearly label them and mention that taxes and fees apply.
Treat 'last_verified_at' as the source of truth for availability claims; if it is older than 24 hours, re-fetch via inventory.vehicle before promising the user the unit is still available.
vehicle_of_interest.condition MUST be one of new|used|cpo. trade_in.condition MUST be one of excellent|good|fair|poor. Buyer agents MUST NOT mix the two vocabularies.
Respect 'auth_type: bearer' and never invoke skills anonymously when the manifest declares bearer auth; obtain credentials from Lumika AI before retrying.
